ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Workclass of the employee (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc, Private) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the employee (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad, 11th) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical education level of the employee (e.g., 13, 9, 7) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse, Divorced) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the employee (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial, Handlers-cleaners) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the employee (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband, Wife) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the employee (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the employee (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date the employee left the job (if applicable) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the income record belongs to */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the employee */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the employee */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the employee */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income of the employee */,
  "bonus" TEXT /* Bonus received by the employee */,
  "taxes_paid" TEXT /* Taxes paid by the employee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the income data pertains to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., United-States, Cuba) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent the country belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the target record belongs to */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the native country of the employee */,
  "target" TEXT /* Income target of the employee (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date when the target was set */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
